title: Shopify GET /products.json — Request Parameters
description: Valid query parameters for Shopify Admin REST API GET /products.json (2026-04)

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return

since_id.description: Return only products with ID greater than this value

ids.description: Comma-separated list of product IDs to retrieve

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response

page_info.description: Cursor for pagination (from Link header of previous response)

created_at_min.description: Return products created after this date (ISO8601)

created_at_max.description: Return products created before this date (ISO8601)

updated_at_min.description: Return products updated after this date (ISO8601)

updated_at_max.description: Return products updated before this date (ISO8601)

published_at_min.description: Return products published after this date (ISO8601)

published_at_max.description: Return products published before this date (ISO8601)
